faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers! Here are the most common questions about our workshops.
faq.stillNeedHelpBody: Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're here to help!
faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our workshops, booking process, and policies.
faq.stillBody: We're here to help! Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.
faq.q1: Do I need any prior experience with epoxy resin?
faq.a1: Not at all! Our workshops are designed for all skill levels, from complete beginners to experienced crafters. Our expert instructors will guide you through every step of the process.
faq.q2: What's included in the workshop price?
faq.a2: Everything you need is included: premium epoxy resins, molds, pigments, safety equipment, tools, and expert instruction. You'll also take home your finished creation!
faq.q3: How long do the workshops last?
faq.a3: Most workshops are 2-3 hours long, which gives you plenty of time to create your piece and allow for proper instruction. The exact duration varies by workshop type.
faq.q4: What should I wear to the workshop?
faq.a4: We recommend wearing comfortable clothes that you don't mind getting a bit messy. We provide aprons and gloves, but it's best to avoid your favorite outfit just in case!
faq.q5: Can I bring my own materials or designs?
faq.a5: We provide all materials to ensure quality and safety. However, you're welcome to discuss custom design ideas with your instructor during the workshop.
faq.a6: You can cancel up to 24 hours before your workshop for a full refund. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice are subject to our standard cancellation fee.
faq.a7: Yes! We have convenient parking available near our studio. Detailed location and parking information will be provided in your booking confirmation email.
faq.q8: Can I book a private workshop for a group?
faq.a8: Absolutely! We offer private workshops for groups of 4 or more. Contact us directly to discuss your requirements and we'll create a custom experience for your group.

workshop.noDescription: No description available for this workshop.

mailList.title: Stay in the Loop
mailList.subtitle: Subscribe to our mailing list and be the first to hear about new workshops, special offers, and events.

reserve.pageSubtitle: Choose your preferred workshop, select a date and time, and join us for an inspiring creative experience!
reserve.successSubtitle: Thank you for your reservation. We're excited to see you at the workshop!
reserve.nextStep1: A confirmation email with your booking details has been sent to your inbox.
reserve.nextStep2: All materials are included — just bring yourself and your creativity!
reserve.nextStep3: Check your email for the exact location and arrival instructions.
reserve.cancelSubtitle: No worries — your payment was cancelled and no charges were made.
reserve.cancelBody: Your spot may still be available. You can try booking again right away, or contact us if you ran into any issues.
reserve.noWorkshopsSub: Check back soon — new sessions are added regularly.

home.heroSubtitle: Make your own epoxy earrings, necklaces and more with real dried flowers — in Leiden.
home.nextSessionsSub: Don't miss out - spots are filling up fast!
home.ourWorkshopsSub: Discover our range of creative workshops designed to inspire and educate. Each workshop includes all materials and expert guidance.
home.beautySub: Get inspired by the amazing pieces created by our workshop participants. These could be your creations too!
home.whySub: Taught by the maker behind Giftoria epoxy jewelry — real craft, real flowers, real results.
home.why1Body: You'll be guided by the maker behind Giftoria — someone who designs and sells epoxy jewelry professionally.
home.why2Body: Work with premium epoxy resin and real dried flowers — the same materials used in Giftoria's own jewelry collection.
home.why3Body: Small group sizes mean personal attention for everyone — no experience needed, just creativity.
home.ctaBody: Join hundreds of satisfied participants who have discovered the joy of epoxy art crafting.
home.privateEventBody: Book a private workshop session for your team, birthday party, hen night, or family gathering. We handle all the materials — you bring the fun.
